title: RCMP arrest four at Coutts blockade, seize weapons cache
notes: RCMP primary release URL still outstanding — attach when found. Media coverage of same event: R-117 (Global News, confirmed live). Legal: charges are not convictions. Two accused acquitted of conspiracy to commit murder (2025); convicted on other counts — see R-119 (CBC Fifth Estate) and R-118 (Alberta Justice Sept 2024 update).
